title: Question about Funis Evangelion 1xx and 222 DVDs

wikitext: []: Question about Funi's Evangelion 1.xx and 2.22 DVDs             Quote Post by svenge » Thu May 19, 2011 4:28 am I'm working on my database of US/Japan Evangelion releases, and I've hit a bit of a roadblock on this question: Are the Funimation US DVD releases of 1.01, 1.11, and 2.22 progressive scan or interlaced? I only own the Blu-ray versions of Funi's releases so I can't check personally from disc, and none of the reviews I found on the web mention this point specifically...

chunks.content:
Article: Question about Funis Evangelion 1xx and 222 DVDs
[]: Question about Funi's Evangelion 1.xx and 2.22 DVDs             Quote Post by svenge » Thu May 19, 2011 4:28 am I'm working on my database of US/Japan Evangelion releases, and I've hit a bit of a roadblock on this question: Are the Funimation US DVD releases of 1.01, 1.11, and 2.22 progressive scan or interlaced? I only own the Blu-ray versions of Funi's releases so I can't check personally from disc, and none of the reviews I found on the web mention this point specifically...
